metrics.name: jvm.memory.used_after_last_gc
metrics.description: Measure of memory used, as measured after the most recent garbage collection event on this pool.

metrics.name: jvm.cpu.time
metrics.description: CPU time used by the process as reported by the JVM.

metrics.name: jvm.cpu.count
metrics.description: Number of processors available to the Java virtual machine.

metrics.name: jvm.class.unloaded
metrics.description: Number of classes unloaded since JVM start.

metrics.name: jvm.cpu.recent_utilization
metrics.description: Recent CPU utilization for the process as reported by the JVM.

metrics.name: jvm.class.loaded
metrics.description: Number of classes loaded since JVM start.

metrics.description: The number of spans processed by the BatchSpanProcessor. [dropped=true if they were dropped due to high throughput]
